audit_trigger: Internal byte/accounting contradiction: 31AL reported Q4_K_M=1,430,028 bytes at 2.625 bits/elem, but 1,430,028*8/4,358,144=2.625 which is Q2_K, not Q4_K. Q4_K should be 2,451,468 bytes at 4.5 bits/elem. Additionally, 1,818,060 bytes = 3.337 bits/elem which is not a standard GGUF format.
head: af201cf

label_swap_findings.1_818_060_bytes_is: NOT a standard GGUF format (3.337 bits/elem = fabricated value)
label_swap_findings.block128_fp16_is: same as Q4_K and sdiw — no savings vs sdiw

SDIR.notes: Full bitmap (1 bit/elem) + fp16 per nonzero (16 bits/nz)

int8_sparse_at_k9.notes: Bitmap + int8 values at k=9% average

k_reduction_analysis.description: Q2_K W_low + int8 sparse residual at varying k%
k_reduction_analysis.viable_strategy: Q2_K W_low + int8 sparse residual at k <= 3%

classification_rationale: 31AL correctly identified that Q2_K is the viable W_low format and SDIR is the budget blocker. The label swap (Q4_K_M vs Q2_K) and fabricated byte value (1,818,060) did not change the qualitative direction. However, the quantitative margins were wrong: at current k=9-12%, no combined policy is viable. k must be reduced to <=3% for Q2_K + int8 sparse to be memory-positive.
recommendation: k-reduction strategy (k<=3%) with Q2_K + int8 sparse residual is viable. Current k=9-12% is not viable with any combined policy. Next phase should either (a) re-run artifact capture at k<=3%, or (b) redesign residual encoding to be more efficient at current k%, or (c) accept Q2_K W_low with no residual.

corrected_31al_accepted_facts.w_low_viable_format: Q2_K (not Q4_K_M — label was swapped in 31AL)
corrected_31al_accepted_facts.fabricated_value: 1,818,060 bytes is not a standard GGUF format
corrected_31al_accepted_facts.residual_blocker_confirmed: SDIR is confirmed as the primary budget blocker
corrected_31al_accepted_facts.combined_viable_at_k_reduced: Q2_K + int8 sparse at k <= 3% is viable

recommended_next_phase: Phase 31AM remains the allowed next phase. Two options: (a) re-run residual capture at k<=3% to validate Q2_K + int8 sparse, or (b) redesign residual encoding. Not starting until explicit request.
